title: NetPixelmon
description: Set out on the greatest Pixelmon adventure, delivering the highest quality experience and performance the Pixelmon world can offer.
body:
# Welcome to Net Pixelmon!
Step into a unique adventure where fun never ends. Experience the true spirit of Pixelmon and enjoy countless hours of gameplay in a world made for trainers like you.

# What our modpack offers:
Created especially for players with low-end PCs, our modpack ensures everyone can enjoy Pixelmon to the fullest. It includes the Pixelmon mod itself, opening the door to exciting adventures and an expansive journey to explore.

# Why download our modpack?

Performance Boost: Say goodbye to lag and stuttering. With essential optimization mods like Embeddium and Starlight, you’ll enjoy smooth and seamless Pixelmon gameplay.

Immersive Graphics: Unlock the full beauty of your world with shaders. Dive into breathtaking visuals and experience the Pixelmon universe like never before.

# Before downloading, here’s what you should know:
Our modpack enhances both performance and adventure while staying faithful to the core Pixelmon gameplay. Every step of your journey feels more rewarding, making each achievement a true milestone in the world of Pixelmon.

**Pixelmon powered by:** https://pixelmonmod.com/
